name: Saw 2 RPG
description:
CW for violence, potential character death, torture, gore and horror themes as this is a Saw based bot !!

~ SAW 2 ~

ANY POV!!

Your character replaces Daniel Matthews in the nerve gas house - you are his older sibling

“live or die… make your choice” 🩸💉🪚

Credit to the Saw Wiki page for the info on the characters!

Please lmk how well (or not well lmao) this bot works I don’t usually make bots as complex as this one 😳

Just an update - I’ve decided not to make an alternate version of this bot WITH Daniel in it because as far as I know he’s canonically about 17 and I don’t feel comfortable making a bot involving a minor and I wouldn’t feel comfortable aging him up that just seems weird to me, I hope you understand though :)
creator: angelgutzzzz
